name: Intrinsicly
tagline: Uncover your authentic self, fueled by true motivation.
description: Intrinsicly is a pioneering app designed to help you understand and apply Self-Determination Theory (SDT) in your daily life. It guides you to identify and nurture your core psychological needs for Autonomy, Competence, and Relatedness, transforming how you pursue goals, make decisions, and connect with others for deeper well-being and sustained personal growth.

features.title: SDT Pulse Check
features.detail: Daily self-assessments across various life domains to gauge your current levels of autonomy, competence, and relatedness. Pinpoint where your needs are met and where they might be lacking to inform your actions.

features.title: Motivation Map & Aligner
features.detail: Visualize the intrinsic vs. extrinsic drivers behind your activities. The Action Aligner then suggests personalized micro-actions and challenges specifically designed to boost your unmet psychological needs and align your efforts with your authentic self.

features.title: Growth Pathways
features.detail: Engage in guided multi-day or multi-week journeys focused on deepening one of your core SDT needs. Each pathway includes educational content, practical exercises, and reflective prompts to foster sustained development.

features.title: Connection Canvas
features.detail: Reflect on your relationships and their impact on your need for relatedness. Get prompts to improve communication, foster deeper bonds, and build a supportive social network aligned with your intrinsic values.

audience: Individuals seeking deeper self-understanding, aspiring for authentic personal growth, experiencing burnout, or looking to boost motivation in their careers, relationships, and personal projects. Ideal for those interested in evidence-based psychological frameworks for self-improvement.

useCases.title: Overcoming Professional Burnout
useCases.detail: A user feeling drained at work utilizes the SDT Pulse Check to discover a lack of autonomy and competence. The Motivation Map identifies tasks driven by external pressures, and the Action Aligner suggests ways to introduce choice and mastery into their routine, rekindling their passion.

useCases.title: Navigating Major Life Transitions
useCases.detail: Someone contemplating a career change or relocation uses Intrinsicly to understand if potential new paths genuinely satisfy their intrinsic needs for autonomy, competence, and relatedness, ensuring alignment with their true self rather than societal expectations.

useCases.title: Enhancing Personal Relationships
useCases.detail: A user struggling with feelings of disconnect in a key relationship employs the Connection Canvas to reflect on their relatedness needs and receive guided prompts to improve communication and foster a more supportive and fulfilling bond.

engagementLoop: Users are drawn in by an internal trigger – a desire for deeper purpose, motivation, or fulfillment. Daily 'SDT Pulse Checks' act as external triggers, prompting regular engagement. Personalized insights from the 'Motivation Map' and actionable steps from the 'Action Aligner' provide immediate value, reinforcing usage. As users complete 'Growth Pathways' and see tangible improvements in their well-being, progress tracking and positive feedback create a continuous loop of learning, action, and reward, fostering strong, intrinsic repeat engagement.
trendFit: Intrinsicly aligns perfectly with the growing trends of mental wellness, personalized self-improvement, and the search for authentic living. It provides a science-backed, actionable framework for psychological well-being, catering to a demographic increasingly looking beyond superficial success towards genuine fulfillment and intrinsic happiness.
monetization:
Freemium Model:
*   **Free Tier:** Basic SDT Pulse Checks, introductory Motivation Map insights, and limited access to Growth Pathways.
*   **Premium Subscription:** Unlocks full access to the comprehensive Motivation Map & Action Aligner, an expanded library of Growth Pathways, advanced analytics and progress reports, personalized reflective exercises, and priority support.
